nasb.text: But he clothed himself with cursing as with his garment, And it entered into his body like water And like oil into his bones.

esv.text: He clothed himself with cursing as his coat; may it soak into his body like water, like oil into his bones!

cnv.text: 他以咒詛當作衣服穿上， 咒詛就像水一般進入他的內臟， 像油一樣進入他的骨頭。

ccb.text: 他咒诅成性， 愿咒诅如水侵入他的身体， 如油浸透他的骨头。

csbs.text: 他把诅咒当作衣袍穿上， 所以诅咒像水那样进到他里面， 像油那样进到他的骨头里。
